---
title: "Project 2"
output: html_document
subtitle: "STATS 220 Semester One, 2026"
date: "2026-03-30"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{css}
body {
  background-color: #808080;
}
h1 {
  text-align: center;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #FFFFFF;
}
h2 {
  text-align: center;
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 35px;
  color: #FFFFFF;
}
h3 {
  text-align: center;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #FFFFFF;
}
h4 {
  text-align: center;
  color: #FFFFFF;
}
p {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 20px;
  color: #FFFFFF;
}
```

## Introduction

## Dynamic report

## Creativity

## Learning reflection

## Appendix


```{r file='exploration.R', eval=FALSE, echo=TRUE}

```
```{r file='dynamic_report.Rmd', eval=FALSE, echo=TRUE}

```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
